That one of these structures was created by Edward Lutyens for Queen Mary. The "mother of forensic science" created structures of this type still used in forensic classes today. The Art Institute of Chicago's houses the Thorne structures of this type, and a 2023 film depicts one of these structures with a bright pink slide. For 10 points, name these small buildings that might be sold by American Girl or Mattel.
